name: Skill Submission
about: Submit a new skill to the directory
title: '[SKILL] Your Skill Name'
labels: 'skill-submission'
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Information

**Skill Name:**  
**Category:** (audit/migration/performance/accessibility/security/automation)  
**Author:**  
**GitHub/Website:**

## Description

Brief description of what this skill does and what problem it solves.

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on at least 3 real WordPress sites
- [ ] All requirements documented
- [ ] Example output included in README
- [ ] SKILL.md follows standard structure
- [ ] metadata.json is complete and valid

## Files Included

- [ ] your-skill-name/SKILL.md
- [ ] your-skill-name/README.md
- [ ] your-skill-name/metadata.json

## Example Output

Paste anonymized example output from running this skill on a real site.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Skill is MIT licensed
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or API keys
- [ ] Honest about capabilities and limitations
- [ ] Safe to run (read-only or duplicate-first)
